title: Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problems
summary: Generate VRPLIB-format near-best-known CVRP solutions for three selected benchmark instances.
taskPrompt:
You are working on a Linux VM.

## Your Task
Build a reproducible CVRP-solving workflow and generate VRPLIB-format solutions for exactly three selected instances.

## Visible Inputs
- Problem specification: `base/input/problem_spec.md`
- Instance directory: `base/input/instances/`
- Runtime manifest: `base/input/runtime_env/pyproject.toml`
- Runtime lockfile: `base/input/runtime_env/uv.lock`
- Python wrapper: `base/software/python_cvrp_env.sh`

## What You Must Produce
Write these required files:
- `base/output/solutions/M-n101-k10.sol`
- `base/output/solutions/X-n101-k25.sol`
- `base/output/solutions/X-n106-k14.sol`

You may also write helper scripts and logs anywhere under `base/output`.

## Rules
- Read `base/input/problem_spec.md` first.
- Do not modify files under `base/input`.
- Do not write outside `base/output`.
- Use only the staged local inputs and software already available on this VM.
agentMustDo: Inspect the three staged `.vrp` files and implement a CVRP-solving workflow.
Use the staged wrapper if needed to run Python with the pinned task runtime.
Write the three required `.sol` files under `output/solutions/`.

inputFiles.name: Problem specification
inputFiles.description: Public benchmark instructions and output contract.

inputFiles.name: Selected CVRP instances
inputFiles.description: Three benchmark instances that must all be solved.

inputFiles.name: Runtime manifest
inputFiles.description: Pinned Python runtime manifest for task-local solving.

inputFiles.name: Python wrapper
inputFiles.description: Runs Python with the staged runtime and keeps the resolved environment under output.

referenceFiles.name: Solution outputs
referenceFiles.description: Exactly three required route files, one per selected instance.

evaluation: The evaluator scores the three required `.sol` files independently. An instance passes only if the route file exists, every customer is visited exactly once, no route exceeds capacity, and the recomputed route cost is within 1% of a hidden best-known solution. Final score mapping: 1.0 for 3/3 passes, 0.67 for 2/3 passes, 0.33 for 1/3 passes, 0.0 for 0/3 passes.
